docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RICHARDSON, FRED IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DANA'S HOUSEKEEPING PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
